detail.description:
Two decades of legendary gameplay, the myth returns!

"Legend of Treasure Hunting: Mythical Edition" perfectly replicates the classic gameplay of the original game, incorporating elements of Eastern mythology to create a fantastical and thrilling world. Here, there are no tedious quests, only the purest PK thrill and the ultimate treasure hunting experience. The winds of change have swept across the continent of Marfa, and the throne in the Heavenly Palace awaits. Warriors, it's time to draw you
